ideation: This animation sequence depicts the robot preparing to deploy a parachute. The arms will move in a coordinated manner to simulate the action of holding and releasing a parachute. Frame 1 will show the robot holding the parachute above its head. Frame 2 will show the arms moving to a position as if releasing the parachute. Frame 3 will show the arms returning to a relaxed position after the release. Frame 4 will show the arms moving down slightly to compensate for the weight of the parachute. Frame 5 will show the arms returning to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms lift overhead, ready to deploy
arms extend outward, releasing the parachute
arms swing down, the chute now open
arms settle slightly, adjusting to the pull
arms hang relaxed, floating gently down
